items.title: Nato condemns Russian 'recklessness' after drone hits Romanian apartment block
items.dek: Romania will hold an emergency meeting following the incident, in which two people were injured.
items.body: Romania will hold an emergency meeting following the incident, in which two people were injured.

items.title: Watch: Moment 14-year-old wins US national spelling bee
items.dek: A teenager from California has won the 2026 Scripps National Spelling Bee, after days of fierce competition.
